purpose: Provenance pointer (audit overclaim/provenance fix B4). The WDM6 (mp_physics=16) savepoint-parity proof lives OUTSIDE the standard proofs/v060/ tree, at proofs/v060_wdm6/. An audit scanning only proofs/v060/ would otherwise miss it. This pointer makes the WDM6 proof discoverable from the standard path.
regeneration_command: taskset -c 0-3 JAX_PLATFORMS=cpu JAX_ENABLE_X64=true PYTHONPATH=src python proofs/v060_wdm6/run_wdm6_parity.py
verdict: overall_pass=true (unmodified WRF mp_wdm6 oracle; fp32 primary + fp64 diagnostic; not a JAX self-compare)
